ballpark_pal.description: A challenging venue for home runs with a very deep center field . The entire left side is deeper than average and the 15-foot-tall fence in right further complicates things for hitters. Batter contact is better than most parks, possibly aided by a clean batter's eye .

weather.description: A challenging venue for home runs with a very deep center field . The entire left side is deeper than average and the 15-foot-tall fence in right further complicates things for hitters. Batter contact is better than most parks, possibly aided by a clean batter's eye .

ballpark_pal.description: A retractable-roof field that is normally enclosed. The tall fences and large outfield promote doubles while suppressing home runs.

weather.description: A retractable-roof field that is normally enclosed. The tall fences and large outfield promote doubles while suppressing home runs.

ballpark_pal.description: The smallest outfield in MLB, offset partially by a taller left-field wall . Stadium architecture dampens the effect from wind but hot days can turn GABP into a home run paradise .

weather.description: The smallest outfield in MLB, offset partially by a taller left-field wall . Stadium architecture dampens the effect from wind but hot days can turn GABP into a home run paradise .

ballpark_pal.description: A large, symmetrical outfield with deep corners and gaps . The center field fence is a few feet closer than the MLB standard.

weather.description: A large, symmetrical outfield with deep corners and gaps . The center field fence is a few feet closer than the MLB standard.

ballpark_pal.description: A retractable roof venue with a zig-zag outfield. The left side is particularly deep while the right is better primed for homers .

weather.description: A retractable roof venue with a zig-zag outfield. The left side is particularly deep while the right is better primed for homers .

ballpark_pal.description: A medium-sized outfield with consistent weather conditions . Plays shallow to center and deeper to both sides . The San Diego marine layer can reduce carry distance , especially at night.

weather.description: A medium-sized outfield with consistent weather conditions . Plays shallow to center and deeper to both sides . The San Diego marine layer can reduce carry distance , especially at night.

ballpark_pal.description: A uniquely shaped field with a 24 foot-tall fence guarding a very shallow right-field corner . Straight-away center is close to home plate but extends to an extremely deep right-field gap . Cool temperatures are the norm and the ever-present out-blowing wind is neutralized by the stadium architecture.

weather.description: A uniquely shaped field with a 24 foot-tall fence guarding a very shallow right-field corner . Straight-away center is close to home plate but extends to an extremely deep right-field gap . Cool temperatures are the norm and the ever-present out-blowing wind is neutralized by the stadium architecture.
